sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
seg = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']
print("Green boxes:")
for n in seg:
    if n['color'] == 'N' and n['pixels'] == 8:
        print(f"  boundary={n['boundary']}")

ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
for r in range(30, 37):
    print(f"Row {r}: {ascii_lines[r]}")

# Check if left green box is inside left charcoal box
print("\nContainment:")
for n in seg:
    if n['children']:
        child_colors = [(seg[c]['color'], seg[c]['pixels']) for c in n['children']]
        print(f"  id={n['id']}, color={n['color']}, contains={child_colors}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
